data.name: The Edge Of - Definitive Edition
data.detailed_description:
The Edge Of is a Mystery NTR visual novel with a tense atmosphere and a story that will keep you on The Edge Of your seat. The Definitive Edition will have one organic art style, extend Beth's perspective, and add more beautiful illustrations. Play as either Sam as he grapples with the fact that his wife might be cheating on him, or Beth, the lovely wife who couldn't possibly be cheating... or is she?

Coming back home after a week-long business trip, Sam can't help but sense that something isn't quite right the moment he set foot inside his house. Is it the fact that his newlywed wife was sleeping in the afternoon rather than waiting impatiently for his return? Or is it because she was rather evasive the moment he questioned her about it? Or maybe it is simply his weary mind playing tricks on him? The latter seems like the most compelling answer, or so he thought, but as he finds himself gazing at a selfie his wife sent him during his business trip--a selfie in her lingerie--he notices something he didn't catch when he first received it; the presence of three inconspicuous fingertips peeking at the edge of the frame.

  • 150k+ Words

  • 2 Different Perspectives

  • 2 Endings

  • Animated Sex scenes

data.short_description: The Edge Of is a Mystery NTR visual novel with a tense atmosphere and a story that will keep you on The Edge Of your seat. The Definitive Edition will have one organic art style, extend Beth's perspective, and add more beautiful illustrations.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher.
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
